chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7585 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.24195/2022 2. For hearing of main case. 17-04-2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Shahid Ali Qureshi, advocate for respondent Mr. Ghulam Ali Khan, advocate for respondent Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, advocate for respondent Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General It is jointly stated that the controversy is pari materia to that which was before this Court in CP D 3571/2023, the determinant order therein dated 11.10.2022 observed as follows:- Learned counsel for the Petitioner has filed a Statement along with Notification dated 30.06.2022 and Exemption Order passed under Sections 159 / 151 and 159 / 150 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001 and submits that the issue now stands resolved in favour of the Petitioner, whereas, learned Counsel appearing for department also concedes. In view of such position, this Petition has served its purpose and is accordingly disposed of, whereas, amount retained by the private respondents pursuant to Order dated 13.06.2022 is no more required to be retained and shall be paid/refunded to the Petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms with pending applications. Learned counsel seeks that this petition may also be disposed of in mutatis mutandis application thereof. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
